title: Meals, entertainment and functions
description: Deductions for meals, snacks, overtime meals, entertainment and functions.
keywords: meals, snacks, overtime meals, entertainment, functions

child_links.title: Meals and snacks
child_links.description: The cost of food and drink during normal working hours is private and not deductible, but there are limited exceptions.

child_links.title: Overtime meal expenses
child_links.description: Deductions for meals you buy and eat while working overtime.

child_links.title: Entertainment and functions
child_links.description: You can't claim the cost of attending functions or participating in entertainment involving food, drink or recreation.

source_title: Meals, entertainment and functions | Australian Taxation Office
source_description: Deductions for meals, snacks, overtime meals, entertainment and functions.
